description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing human figure draped in a long, flowing robe, with the head slightly bowed and arms crossed in front, holding an indistinct object. The figure stands on a rectangular plinth, and the robe's folds are rendered with soft, rounded contours. The facial features are subtle, with the head gently inclined downward, suggesting a contemplative or solemn mood. The back of the sculpture shows the robe cascading in vertical lines, with some surface wear visible. The material appears to be a light-colored stone or marble, with some areas showing a faint warm patina. The overall form is solid and monolithic, with a classical, serene presence.
description: A robed human figure stands on a rectangular base, head bowed and arms crossed, sculpted in light stone with soft, flowing details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bowed head, crossed arms, and the draped robe's folds, with the figure's profile visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the vertical lines of the robe and the back of the head, with the rectangular base fully visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the bowed head and crossed arms, with the robe's drapery and base details.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the full face, crossed arms, and the front of the robe, emphasizing the contemplative posture.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
